commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an optional per-turn usageState object to reply_payload_sending, records model/usage/context/identity/limit atoms from agent-runner, and introduces a cached provider-usage limit resolver with tests.

PR surface: Source +425, Tests +86. Total +511 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review findings: source inspection shows sessionKey fallback consumption, authMode-only limit lookup, and ambient provider-auth resolution. I did not run a live replay, but the current head paths are clear enough for focused unit regressions.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] A focused repair can address the session correlation, auth-profile limit scoping, and docs gaps without deciding a broader product direction.
